## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run command `...`
2. With config `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include the full error traceback.

```
Paste error here
```

## Environment

- Python version: [e.g., 3.10.12]
- PyTorch version: [e.g., 2.1.0]
- Installation method: [conda / pip / Docker]
- GPU: [Yes/No, model if yes]
- Commit hash: [output of `git rev-parse --short HEAD`]
